entries.gt_3594b6e2064fc7: forgery helps until the first careful stamp
entries.gt_3599194bbcb911: looks like a patrol, but acts like a purge
entries.gt_36fa90f2890e7b: a new passage can open your back to enemies
entries.gt_3776f02adb8f4c: The Wild do not recognize queues or stamps. Prepare barter, an ambush, or flight with them.
entries.gt_38dd8058ffdcb8: an unsealed sample becomes dirt and a question
entries.gt_3917cd169d355a: without a key, first see who is nearby
entries.gt_395dfce8d084f8: lure it out of the room, or enter with a door kit and a retreat plan
entries.gt_3a04548a3c6924: after the Lotochnik, check the dry bank, not the center of the water
entries.gt_3a1dc0694261bc: loot under the carpet is never worth putting your face in spores
entries.gt_3a3d2629b8e1f5: check the floor with light first, then run
entries.gt_3ab493a1a89ecb: the gasoline can is needed before the fight, not after the first spit
entries.gt_3b059e7acbb164: short range requires a clean step back
entries.gt_3b7406ef90cc31: tight rooms quickly become a crush
entries.gt_3c282b5a0aa0f7: slow, painful, and good at stopping a large target
entries.gt_3c860c024c4fc7: save nails for a narrow axis and armor without a lunge
entries.gt_3ca5dbc56cecc5: a robbed caravan later comes to the shop as an empty shelf
entries.gt_3cc1b4ca149159: after the Bonecutter, check HP immediately: a late bandage is not heroism
entries.gt_3d01a57576328c: a missed sledgehammer swing opens you to a lunge
entries.gt_3d028ad07b08d8: rare ammo does not have to lie next to a rare gun
entries.gt_3d7eee079c7c44: If an enemy calls a pack, hit the source, not the tail's bookkeeping.
entries.gt_3df6a67201ecd8: check the door before the siren
entries.gt_3f439ae21a770b: step off the wet axis, cut the corner, and do not stand in water
entries.gt_3f5fca5bd7f26a: 5-6 PSI is often cheaper than a rare round
entries.gt_3f76ad04ae0e73: before using it, check the threat level, not only your fear
entries.gt_408eb6b0f34687: an ally in the passage also takes the line
entries.gt_418f6f65744e03: An ally in the passage catches your lines of fire. PSI beam and buckshot do not read party cards.
entries.gt_41a7017363f5a1: keep the bayonet for a passage where you cannot swing
entries.gt_41cb73310e2cb8: burns, but does not close a serious wound
entries.gt_4213185bb60fd8: do not open the jar, keep it dry, fill out the experiment log
entries.gt_4232af2f59692e: a mistake there is cheaper than in the corridor
entries.gt_4255086c2b5516: fire stays on the floor and cuts your retreat
entries.gt_42e054fb455566: watch the hands, do not let it close without a reason, and keep a retreat
entries.gt_43eb546724a973: dense impulse over a small area
entries.gt_44344eb5af4489: refresh the mark after clearing, not after a bite
entries.gt_443d2248e0e226: look for a knife, pipe, or any tool before the first sortie
entries.gt_44c66032ee24f7: fighting a Panelnik in a corner means working for it
entries.gt_454f157d663d0a: check all three fields before the door
entries.gt_4582db65f4de8a: on a long raid it feeds worse than kasha and tinned stew
entries.gt_45933cff506398: If a person looks like an enemy, still check the faction. A mistake costs reputation.
entries.gt_4650a5ecacb070: machines, noise, and metal attract work problems
entries.gt_46fa24fa14ef24: at the far end of the corridor, buckshot turns into noise
entries.gt_4770997adaa66b: take a filter, flashlight, and short way back
entries.gt_478bddaedb34ba: do not stand by a wet pipe, keep a dry corner and a strong first hit
entries.gt_478d612ea9f33b: the windup is long; a miss in a doorway can cost HP
entries.gt_47e8bbe57f335c: digging through trash with a full backpack of food is dangerous
entries.gt_48b8ddaed638f4: a recipe without resources does not feed or repair
entries.gt_48ef23749c9479: an expensive use without shelter will not save you from the siren
entries.gt_491ae2d8bfa1c8: better to turn it in as a problem than feed yourself
entries.gt_493e38fd5489fc: pull it out of the fog, burn it with an explosion, and do not run blind
entries.gt_4950a79568df15: inspection likes an even stamp and nervous paper
entries.gt_4952a898723d1d: expensive answer to a crowd in sight
entries.gt_49f0a964679678: missing with a harpoon leaves you with an expensive pause
entries.gt_4a89568a15b4f2: a hacking mistake can call security
entries.gt_4b24a4c635b6c5: red cracks flare before the lunge
entries.gt_4bbc73a0a23dab: If an enemy goes toward light, cut unnecessary light and leave yourself a path.
entries.gt_4bfbd39f533ce6: take water, filter, and rounds before reporting
entries.gt_4c6eaecc0d5f39: cut unnecessary light, change position, and strike from a dark corner
entries.gt_4d195454708d58: a child's cross on the wall does not replace a hermodoor
entries.gt_4d41e70fb14580: If an enemy shoots, a corner heals better than pride.
entries.gt_4d940d876fbb1f: precise expensive strike against a strong single target
entries.gt_4dbd3e73b2dd58: fighting it shoulder to the wall means giving it work
entries.gt_4de3da244fa4c4: 7.62 is rare; an empty automatic rifle scares nobody
entries.gt_4e05bdfffa0ef8: there are many people, quests, and witnesses here
entries.gt_4f5c465f301523: show such things to Yakov, not to the neighbors
entries.gt_4fd1ebb7e84679: If a strange route appears on the map, walk it with water and light.
entries.gt_4ff0571e45d069: arrive with a container and not your last HP
entries.gt_500a7726faeee5: a wet tray makes it stronger and you slower
entries.gt_5019ea0b26a0fe: do not take a PPSh without a 9mm reserve
entries.gt_50c08945d4e075: a wet filter is replaced, not dried on a pipe
entries.gt_50d1c419d6e7d7: turn the flashlight on for a reason, not forever
entries.gt_50e4e457e7dc32: leave room for parts and a weapon with durability
entries.gt_50faaec05a5622: removes a big problem in a big room
entries.gt_518fd236eb7366: The experiment log is filled out after contact, not after you forget the pulse.
entries.gt_519870275bdde6: a lift without checking may be not transport, but a mouth
entries.gt_51ea9c1e463f50: against a Betonnik, a PM usually spends rounds
entries.gt_51f632cd7be2dc: someone else's room does not become yours after the first shot
entries.gt_5247d9310db7bd: if data was deleted, that is also a warning
entries.gt_527b8498ed7a55: points to a container or storeroom
entries.gt_5299315845b989: production likes a list, not a heroic pocket
entries.gt_529b748d02d9dd: keep a path to the lift and do not drop water for the view
entries.gt_52cfd95d61faa8: you will still have to find water
entries.gt_5351ddbb784299: after the eel, check pipes and banks, but do not go into the water for small things
entries.gt_5427ec7dd5f7d6: A cultist can be a trader, enemy, or witness. An altar nearby changes the price of any conversation.
entries.gt_5452c278a3d27b: wide stop in a desperate room
entries.gt_545c691e348274: against a monster, fists usually buy a second, not victory
entries.gt_546b87713a3276: use the time to retreat, heal, or finish another target
entries.gt_5471d350ae04cb: Buckshot is stronger in a corridor where the target is close. At the far end, buckshot makes noise.
entries.gt_54dcd5ca2a4963: after the Safeguard, check NET evidence and do not start a second risk at once
entries.gt_54deb9f496acf7: after throwing, move behind a corner or door immediately
entries.gt_557ddf14b48bc1: loot inside, an owner or thief outside
entries.gt_5589c6b102cb0a: do not show contraband to a strange patrol
entries.gt_55f69d1a3ce497: medium range, high durability, and a good working hit
entries.gt_5671593625b2e3: keep the archive card dry and do not bend it at the door
entries.gt_56768f2c6f8198: stands on roots and strikes with sap
entries.gt_56f4621041fbb4: floats in fog and moves in a pack
entries.gt_8b449fa50ed261: Iridescent sample for PSI and void research. NII accepts it only in intact containers.
entries.gt_8d530cd02aeb1e: List of doors and supply stops. Caravaners pay for a working route.
entries.gt_8e12c91d24ba58: The forged document smells of iodine and smoke.
entries.gt_8f633e584275d6: Contact diagram for a panel or lift bypass. An electrician takes one without many questions.
entries.gt_8f64c42500e684: Archive warrant for lower affairs. Suspicious without a signature, but rare.
entries.gt_9232179febb403: The envelope is sealed until reading.
entries.gt_96d265a9d7a726: Opened transparent sample. Science pays less; the market pretends the jar is still valuable. E - destroy the remains.
entries.gt_987531085b0e78: Board with tracks and relays. Needed for instruments, lift bypasses, and repairs.
entries.gt_9c83188cb2223a: Sealed Veretar sample. The packet keeps sand from drying rations, photos, and passes; the Ministry and NII accept it as evidence.
entries.gt_9e32933d1f839f: Medical certificate with a stamp. In the quarantine queue, they check it before your face.
entries.gt_a0e754abdd489b: Metal with someone else's pressure number. Evidence that the zero release was opened by hands, not rumor.
entries.gt_a2d23e41abf538: Paper granting the right to one bottle. Use it honestly, steal it as evidence, or spend it on a forgery.
entries.gt_a3047469a9dea7: TT pistol. Damage 27. Stronger than the PM, uses 7.62 TT rounds
entries.gt_a38e49b09c1492: PSI shard: 5 PSI, 24 damage. Cheap directed strike for a narrow passage.
entries.gt_a4e81d13d4996a: Rare rifle rounds for a Kalashnikov
entries.gt_a8af816222e47a: The bank recognizes that the debt is closed. Others recognize it only while the stamp is dry.
entries.gt_aaa94a484e6388: Installs one door in a passage. A door wins time during samosbor and pursuit
entries.gt_ab17dbee2725f1: Sucks in purple samosbor fog. R: clear the cell in front of you. Do not open the bag
entries.gt_ac6270718c557a: Tea, starch, and the correct NII tag. Scientific on the outside, empty by conscience.
entries.gt_ac73fed782664b: Return to the PSI mark: 7 PSI. Works better if the mark is by shelter or a lift.
entries.gt_ae28ae746b7125: Hold R: cleans blood/dirt within a one-cell radius and improves relations. Inspection likes a clean floor
entries.gt_af3274b2ff8dc8: Form for a service lift bypass. Disputed without a stamp, more expensive with one.
entries.gt_b06cce5d5bfa4a: The third clause is crossed out in purple.
entries.gt_b4a03ee7b9f909: Forgery for the archive passage, night weapons window, and forgery buyers. Witnesses and audits remember an even stamp.
entries.gt_b62dc980ba21e1: Diagram of lift branches and bypasses. More useful than a rumor by the cabin before travel.
entries.gt_b9317d80681e96: Blue sample without hermetic seal. Gives a short surge, but stains hands, the log, and the nearest protocol.
entries.gt_bab388ed1aa19e: The handwriting is angry, the arguments precise.
entries.gt_bae40bf8fe4bd9: Loud narrow UV beam. R: impulse against eyes and spirits, reveals black traces. Battery: 36 impulses
entries.gt_be0fdc824c4767: Extract with surname, room, and marks. Shows who is trusted in the archive.
entries.gt_be2cbc93caa97b: The needle shows pipe pressure and mood. On Heatline Zero it makes repairs precise, but is not consumed.
entries.gt_be766360d6e77d: Fireproof thread for hot doors and hot valves. Consumed during Heatline Zero repairs.
entries.gt_bfb48482bcaf00: Dense seal impulse: 11 PSI, 32 damage over a small area. Do not place near forms.
entries.gt_c0637069d0b209: Forgery of weapons clearance. Contraband paper: risk it, or turn it in to a liquidator as confiscated goods.
entries.gt_c22480308131cf: Sharp residue of a window that was not there.
entries.gt_c40d4d99705064: Massive dark sample in thick glass. Liquidators require a UV check before handover.
entries.gt_c57b7d571f6fef: Demolishes walls. Heavy wear: lasts 10 blocks, choose the place in advance
entries.gt_c6f448351e7f0f: Black spike from the lower route. Carry it apart from documents and food.
entries.gt_c8cee60b6923da: The box beeps near a suspicious resident. Often wrong.
entries.gt_c91c6d480371b7: For flooded passages. Damage 88. Slow precise industrial harpoon
entries.gt_ca8e6e72d00fd7: Forged ministry inspection sheet. Can open conversation with the archive, but the too-even stamp triggers face checks.
entries.gt_cda1562d694f16: Folder with a torn-out resident card. The archive and blackmailers pay well for this paper.
entries.gt_d0b48568e1df0c: Installs one wall block. Closes a passage when there is nothing to hold the defense with
entries.gt_d3f4ef3e543e5d: Almost the right color and someone else's stamp. At the checkpoint they may risk asking for your surname.
entries.gt_d52b7036789b8a: Half passport, half promise to let you through.
entries.gt_d52dc35b341718: Empty sealed jar with a liability act. Without it, the protocol will not accept a sample.
entries.gt_d530f8a4f1b76e: Pack of Prima. The smoking room accepts it like a pass without a photograph
entries.gt_d6aaf84d78b2e6: Rubber stamp for acts, complaints, and wet certificates.
entries.gt_d79b951a33d65d: Acidic OVS sample in thick glass. NII asks not to put it near food, cloth, or anything you care about.
entries.gt_d79c0c2287539d: Wet brass tag with notches of the dry bridge. Kot needs it as proof that the route through the eels still holds.
